mapper.select: SELECT * FROM problem_supported_language WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM problem_supported_language WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND LOWER(language_code) = LOWER(#{languageCode}) LIMIT 1
SELECT LOWER(language_code) FROM problem_supported_language WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO problem_supported_language ( problem_id, language_code, is_default, starter_code, starter_filename, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.problemId}, #{item.languageCode}, #{item.isDefault}, #{item.starterCode}, #{item.starterFilename}, #{item.status}, #{item.sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT language, COUNT(*) AS problemCount FROM ( SELECT LOWER(psl.language_code) AS language, psl.problem_id FROM problem_supported_language psl WHERE psl.status = 'ACTIVE'
UNION ALL
SELECT LOWER(p.language) AS language, p.id AS problem_id FROM problem p WHERE p.language IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_supported_language legacy WHERE legacy.problem_id = p.id ) ) language_union GROUP BY language ORDER BY problemCount DESC
